description: Library mapping index. Each entry describes a UI library's variant/prop conventions for use by ds-build. ds-build loads the matching file when it detects the library from package.json or designer input.

libraries.notes: Uses `variant` + `colorScheme` + `size` as variant props. Compound components via `{Component}.{Part}` syntax (e.g., Menu.Item).
Uses `variant` + `color` + `size` as variant props. Many components have `.Item`, `.Target`, `.Dropdown` subcomponents.
CVA-based variant system. Copy-paste components in `components/ui/`. Built on Radix primitives. Uses `variant` + `size` props; colors from CSS variables.
